user_query: I want to ensure that we visit cities in Oceania with low homicide rates and get a ranked list of the top 15 cities.

TaskList.description: Query a database to retrieve homicide rate statistics for cities in Oceania.
Rank the cities based on their homicide rates from lowest to highest.
Select the top 15 cities from the ranked list.
Format the results into a user-friendly list to present to the user.
